calendar.matters:
Petiton For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petiton For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Continued To Jan-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Roland Carr.

Mr. Byrne requested a continuance stating that he understands the need for a death certificate, that he has been to two counties to see what has happened to the Trustee, and that he believes the Trustee is deceased or that he moved to the valley and is very ill. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to go to San Mateo and have the Trustee removed to create a vacancy or prove that the Trustee is deceased. The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee was continued to January 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a supplement or an amendment to the petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petiton For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
